title: koanophyllon cubense
intro: Koanophyllon cubense is a plant species native to the Caribbean, belonging to the family Asteraceae. It is also known as Cuban featherbush or Cuban ragwort. Koanophyllon cubense has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The plant can be used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, to help alleviate symptoms of fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems, as well as to boost the immune system.
